texts.label: text
texts.orig: Rates include all taxes/local fees & charges. Should the Government increase or decrease taxes or apply new taxes, Kilimanjaro Balloon Safaris reserves the right to re-negotiate the rates of this agreement accordingly.
texts.text: Rates include all taxes/local fees & charges. Should the Government increase or decrease taxes or apply new taxes, Kilimanjaro Balloon Safaris reserves the right to re-negotiate the rates of this agreement accordingly.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Child Rates are between 4 -11 years of age only. Children under the age of 4 are not permitted.
texts.text: Child Rates are between 4 -11 years of age only. Children under the age of 4 are not permitted.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Flights operate 7 days a week including all holidays at sunrise, subject to weather conditions. Approx. 1-hour Hot Air Balloon Safari (ranges from 45 -90 minutes). 4 -5 hours from pick-up to return. Chefprepared 'Made to Order' hot breakfast . Traditional Champagne Celebration. In-flight commentary and highlights by expert Captains, giving passengers insights on the local ecosystem, Mt. Kilimanjaro, the Amboseli National Park, local game in the area, hot air ballooning history and principals including meteorology, altitude, navigation, equipment, and life in the bush. Return transportation Game drive to the Balloon Camp and on return to the Camp or Lodge.
texts.text: Flights operate 7 days a week including all holidays at sunrise, subject to weather conditions. Approx. 1-hour Hot Air Balloon Safari (ranges from 45 -90 minutes). 4 -5 hours from pick-up to return. Chefprepared 'Made to Order' hot breakfast . Traditional Champagne Celebration. In-flight commentary and highlights by expert Captains, giving passengers insights on the local ecosystem, Mt. Kilimanjaro, the Amboseli National Park, local game in the area, hot air ballooning history and principals including meteorology, altitude, navigation, equipment, and life in the bush. Return transportation Game drive to the Balloon Camp and on return to the Camp or Lodge.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Commemorative Flight Ascension Certificate, signed by the Captain.
texts.text: Commemorative Flight Ascension Certificate, signed by the Captain.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Reservations  are  made  centrally  through  our  reservation  office.  A  link  to  an  online  reservation  system  will  be provided for online accounts and bookings. This link can also be used to see availability. Written confirmation  will  be  provided  by Kilimanjaro  Balloon  Safaris within  24-48  hours  of  receipt  of  booking
texts.text: Reservations  are  made  centrally  through  our  reservation  office.  A  link  to  an  online  reservation  system  will  be provided for online accounts and bookings. This link can also be used to see availability. Written confirmation  will  be  provided  by Kilimanjaro  Balloon  Safaris within  24-48  hours  of  receipt  of  booking

texts.label: text
texts.orig: request, allowing for time differences, weekends, and public holidays.
texts.text: request, allowing for time differences, weekends, and public holidays.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Kilimanjaro Balloon Safaris will issue vouchers stating clearly that the booking has been booked and paid for through the Kilimanjaro Balloon Safaris reservations system, including a booking/confirmation number.
texts.text: Kilimanjaro Balloon Safaris will issue vouchers stating clearly that the booking has been booked and paid for through the Kilimanjaro Balloon Safaris reservations system, including a booking/confirmation number.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: If the client has pre-booked and paid for services, the voucher will also state this, and no monies will be collected by the supplier.
texts.text: If the client has pre-booked and paid for services, the voucher will also state this, and no monies will be collected by the supplier.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: If we cancel the flight, you will be entitled to a full refund, unless rescheduled for another day. If you cancel within:
texts.text: If we cancel the flight, you will be entitled to a full refund, unless rescheduled for another day. If you cancel within:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: a. 14-days prior to flight date -No fees charged.
texts.text: 14-days prior to flight date -No fees charged.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Large Groups of passengers may be subject to different cancellation conditions.
texts.text: Large Groups of passengers may be subject to different cancellation conditions.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: For Group and FOC policies, please contact the Kilimanjaro Balloon Safaris team.
texts.text: For Group and FOC policies, please contact the Kilimanjaro Balloon Safaris team.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Hot Air Ballooning is a weather dependant activity, so if the balloon flight is cancelled due to inclement weather, passengers can either reschedule, or receive a full refund.
texts.text: Hot Air Ballooning is a weather dependant activity, so if the balloon flight is cancelled due to inclement weather, passengers can either reschedule, or receive a full refund.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Payment to be made in contracted currency by wire transfer or EFT deposit in advance of confirmation. Any payments made by credit card will incur a 5% surcharge. Contracted/Remittee is responsible for any payment transfer charges.
texts.text: Payment to be made in contracted currency by wire transfer or EFT deposit in advance of confirmation. Any payments made by credit card will incur a 5% surcharge. Contracted/Remittee is responsible for any payment transfer charges.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In the event a payment is not received/or canceled for any reason, the Contractor agent shall immediately replace the same with a Bankers cheque or cash, and additionally agrees to pay three percent (3%) as a returned cheque fee. Failure by the agent to replace the 'unpaid' cheque within 48 hours will constitute a breach/default of contract and Kilimanjaro Balloon Safaris thereafter reserves the right to cancel or nullify this contract.
texts.text: In the event a payment is not received/or canceled for any reason, the Contractor agent shall immediately replace the same with a Bankers cheque or cash, and additionally agrees to pay three percent (3%) as a returned cheque fee. Failure by the agent to replace the 'unpaid' cheque within 48 hours will constitute a breach/default of contract and Kilimanjaro Balloon Safaris thereafter reserves the right to cancel or nullify this contract.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The agent agrees to pay any/all costs including Legal fees, Court costs and any other expenses incurred by Kilimanjaro Balloon Safaris and/or its nominees in the collection of unpaid invoices, returned cheques or default payments.
texts.text: The agent agrees to pay any/all costs including Legal fees, Court costs and any other expenses incurred by Kilimanjaro Balloon Safaris and/or its nominees in the collection of unpaid invoices, returned cheques or default payments.

texts.text: All payments can be made to:

texts.text: AIRBORNE AFRICAN ANTICS LIMITED INVESTMENT AND MORTGAGES BANK YAYA BRANCH

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Any disputes regarding an invoice must be received by the KBS Accounts Department within 30 days of the Booking Date, and only the amount in dispute may be deducted from the payment due, which must be made within specified time limit.
texts.text: Any disputes regarding an invoice must be received by the KBS Accounts Department within 30 days of the Booking Date, and only the amount in dispute may be deducted from the payment due, which must be made within specified time limit.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Default of undisputed payment may result in the agent's clients being refused admittance to the Balloon Camp until payment is made in full.
texts.text: Default of undisputed payment may result in the agent's clients being refused admittance to the Balloon Camp until payment is made in full.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The parties to this Agreement confirm and agree that the contents of this Agreement are strictly confidential to the undersigned and that no part of this agreement in any form may divulged to any third party.
texts.text: The parties to this Agreement confirm and agree that the contents of this Agreement are strictly confidential to the undersigned and that no part of this agreement in any form may divulged to any third party.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Kilimanjaro  Balloon  Safaris  has  Insurance  in  place,  as  required  by  Government  Regulations.  Kilimanjaro  Balloon Safaris does not and will not accept responsibility for any incident of any nature involving clients who are flying, should they exceed the current required levels of Insurance.
